violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting due to door being damaged during a delivery. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Per PIC, door currently has work order in place. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

Several ceiling tiles in the retail area is in poor repair. The tiles were observed water damaged or broken. Per PIC, leak has been fixed. Tiles to be replaced The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. V&D poster provided Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2023

The floors in the back storage area have an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2023
The walls in back storage area near outside door is in poor repair(torn or missing drywall). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2023
